articles.title: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
articles.description: Scotland's former first minister is challenged by Laura Kuenssberg over the SNP embezzlement scandal, and at times struggles to hold back tears.

articles.title: Watch: Sturgeon says 'I will not apologise for crimes of my former husband'
articles.description: The former first minister of Scotland says she feels she is "serving a sentence for a crime I did not commit".

articles.title: Hundreds arrested in France after wild Champions League celebrations
